MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together: PTR-09-292462 Valley Trust for the benefit of Erika Carlson, PTR-09-292463 Valley Trust for the benefit of Wen Trust, PTR-15-298484 Valley Inter Vivos Trust, CPF-89-690457 FW & Gladys Valley Trust.
Appearances: Robert Anderson for the Trustees.

The Court stated that it just received the recent filing, will need additional time for review and instructed that courtesy copies be left with the clerk (which was done). The accounting petitions in all 4 cases were continued to June 1, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were called together as they are all related: 292459, 292460, 292461, 292462, 292463 and 690457.

Appearances: Robert Anderson for Wells Fargo Bank.

Mr. Anderson addressed all of the issues raised in the Examiner's notes. The Court approved all of the accounting petitions (subject to signing of the written orders).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
